data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding minimum remaining-validity days.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'items with minimum remaining-validity days', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for credential expiry dates and reverification timestamps, which are related but do not confirm the specific requirement of remaining-validity days. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of items with minimum remaining-validity days.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for minimum remaining-validity days.
